freedomKeys.name: flow02_match_timeout_seconds
freedomKeys.semantics: Maximum seconds B1 CompatibilityScoringService waits before treating partial results as success (TIMEOUT-AS-SUCCESS-MODE). Tenants with large matching-profile pools may increase; tenants wanting fast-fail may decrease.

freedomKeys.name: flow02_debounce_window_seconds
freedomKeys.semantics: How long a cached B1 scoring result is honored before recomputing. Prevents repeated scoring for the same user within 5 minutes. Tenants may tune to match their event frequency.

freedomKeys.name: flow02_match_weight_industry
freedomKeys.semantics: Weight of industry-code signal in compatibility scoring. Sum of all 4 weights must equal 1.0. Tenants in niche industries may increase this; generalist platforms may decrease.

freedomKeys.name: flow02_match_weight_stage
freedomKeys.semantics: Weight of business-stage signal in compatibility scoring. Early-stage-focused tenants may increase; mature-business-focused tenants may decrease.

freedomKeys.name: flow02_match_weight_location
freedomKeys.semantics: Weight of location-proximity signal in compatibility scoring. Local-first platforms increase this; global platforms decrease it.

freedomKeys.name: flow02_match_weight_team
freedomKeys.semantics: Weight of team-size-tier signal in compatibility scoring. Enterprise-focused tenants may increase; solo-founder platforms may decrease.

notes: All 6 keys are TYPE-A (value change only). No TYPE-B grammar change available — flow UI is admin-only. TYPE-A on match weights is the fastest proof: change industry weight from 0.4 to a tenant-specific value, rerun jest, confirm test FC-ADAPT-2 reflects new weight.
